stages.concept:
# Unit 049: 과거완료의 용법 (경험, 계속) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 과거완료의 용법 중 **경험**과 **계속**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **경험** 용법은 과거의 특정 시점을 기준으로 그 이전까지 **~한 적이 있었다**를 나타내요.

> He **had been** to London before he came to Seoul.
> 그는 서울에 오기 전에 런던에 간 적이 있었다.

> She **had never** seen snow before she visited Korea.
> 그녀는 한국에 방문하기 전까지 눈을 본 적이 없었다.

> I **had met** him once before the party.
> 나는 파티 전에 그를 한 번 만난 적이 있었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **계속** 용법은 과거의 특정 시점 이전부터 그 시점까지 **계속**되어 온 일을 나타내요.

> They **had lived** in Busan for 10 years before they moved to Seoul.
> 그들은 서울로 이사하기 전에 부산에서 10년 동안 살았었다.

> She **had studied** French for 5 years before she traveled to Paris.
> 그녀는 파리로 여행하기 전에 5년 동안 프랑스어를 공부했었다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 과거완료의 경험, 계속 용법은 현재완료와 비슷한데, 기준 시점이 '과거'라는 것이 다른 거군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 049: 과거완료의 용법 경험, 계속 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
I (     ) surfing recently.
> **정답** had tried

---

**02.** She ? there for three years before she moved.
> **정답** had lived

---

**03.** He ? never ? Korean food before the trip.
> **정답** had, eaten

---

**04.** They ? each other for ten years before they got married.
> **정답** had known

---

**05.** Before the show, I ? never ? a live concert.
> **정답** had, seen

---

**06.** 다음 문장에 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
Before moving to Seoul, she had never visited a big city.
> **정답** 경험

---

**07.** He had worked at the company for five years before he quit.
> **정답** 계속

---

**08.** I had never ridden a horse before that day.
> **정답** 경험

---

**09.** They had been friends since elementary school.
> **정답** 계속

---

**10.** My grandmother had lived in Busan for three years before she moved to Seoul.
> **정답** 계속

---

**11.** 그가 나의 영어 선생님이 되기 전에 나는 Tom을 일년 동안 알고 있었다.
힌트 become, know
I Tom for a year before he my English teacher.
> **정답** had, known, became

---

**12.** 나는 중국어를 배우기 전에 영어를 10년동안 공부했었다.
힌트 learn, study
I English for ten years until I Chinese.
> **정답** had, studied, learned

---

**13.** 할머니는 우리가 도착하기 전까지 오후 내내 요리를 하고 있었다.
힌트 arrive, cook
My grandmother all afternoon until we at her house.
> **정답** had, cooked, arrived

---

**14.** Amy는 작년에 일본을 방문하기 전에 아시아를 두 번 다녀온 적이 있었다.
힌트 visit, travel
Amy Asia twice before she Japan last year.
> **정답** had, traveled, visited

---

**15.** 아빠가 자전거를 사 주기 전까지 자전거를 타 본 적이 없다. [buy, never, ride]
I a bicycle until my dad it for me.
> **정답** had, never, ridden, bought

---

**16.** 나의 형은 중요한 시합 전에 여러 번 축구 연습을 했다.
힌트 practiced / many / times / had / soccer
My brother before the important match.
> **정답** had, practiced, soccer, many, times

---

**17.** Amy는 미술 동아리에 가입하기 전에는 친구들이 많이 없었다.
힌트 many / friends / had / had / not
Amy before she joined the art club.
> **정답** had, not, had, many, friends

---

**18.** 엄마가 방 청소하라고 시킬 때까지 내 방은 며칠 동안 더러웠다.
힌트 dirty / had / been
My room for days until my mom made me clean it.
> **정답** had, been, dirty

---

**19.** 이전에 Jake를 여름 캠프에서 만난 적이 있었기 때문에 나는 그를 바로 알아보았다.
힌트 had / met / Jake
Because I at a summer camp before, I recognized him right away.
> **정답** had, met, Jake

---

**20.** 그 아이는 작년에 영어 캠프를 가기 전에는 배를 타 본 적이 없었다.
힌트 had / been / never
The kid on a boat before he went to the English camp last year.
> **정답** had, never, been
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 049: 과거완료의 용법 경험, 계속 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They __________ near my house for ten years when
they moved there.
have lived
has lived
had lived
live
> **정답** had lived

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My brother __________ a doctor before he went
abroad.
had been
have been
has been
is
• abroad 해외로, 해외에
> **정답** had been

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The teacher __________ English for 30 minutes when
I entered the classroom.
He __________ in the classroom for an hour before I
arrived.
taught - is
teaches - is
has taught - has been
had taught - had been
> **정답** had taught - had been

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
He __________ about her reputation many times
since he met her.
He __________ anyone like her before then.
had heard - had never seen
had heard - never saw
has heard - had never seen
has heard - has never seen
• reputation 명성
> **정답** has heard - had never seen

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Before I came to the U.S, I __________ to Egypt twice.
I __________ such a wonderful place before I traveled
there.
had traveled - had never seen
travel - saw
had traveled - have never seen
travel - see
> **정답** had traveled - had never seen

---

**06.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 숲이 울창해지기 전에 큰 화재가 여러 번 있었다.
Large fires have broken out several times
before the forest became dense.
Large fires break out several times before the
forest becomes dense.
Large fires has broken out several times
before the forest becomes dense.
Large fires had broken out several times
before the forest became dense.
• dense 울창한, 빽빽한
> **정답** Large fires had broken out several times before the
forest became dense.

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
어제 컴퓨터가 완전히 망가지기 전에 그녀는 컴퓨터를 세 번
사용했다.
She had used the computer three times before
it breaks down yesterday.
She uses the computer three times before it
breaks down yesterday.
She had used the computer three times before
it broke down yesterday.
She has used the computer three times before
it broke down yesterday.
> **정답** She had used the computer three times before it
broke down yesterday.

---

**08.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
<보기> Amy had read the book four times when I
bought it from her.
Tom had been to Egypt three times when he
was young.
I had washed my hands twice before I had
lunch.
Tom had dried the painting for two hours
before it rained.
Amy had cleaned up the house for an hour
when he arrived.
> **정답** Tom had been to Egypt three times when he was
young., I had washed my hands twice before I had
lunch.

---

**09.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy had failed many times before she won
the prize.
She had taught science for three years by the
time I entered middle school.
He had studied Spanish for five years before
he went to Spain.
We had checked the plan twice before we
started.
They had studied for five hours before they
took a vocabulary test.
> **정답** We had checked the plan twice before we started.

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 용법이 다른 문장을 고르시오.
He had played computer games for 3 hours
before he did his homework.
She had waited for me for two hours when I
arrived.
He had corrected his words several times
before he posted them.
By the time I finished my work, I had worked
for this company for six years.
• correct 교정하다
• post (글, 사진)을 올리다, 게시하다
> **정답** He had corrected his words several times before he
posted them.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
She __________ in a lot of effort before she
succeeded.
He __________ in this field for four years since he
came to our team.
has put - has worked
had put - has worked
have put - has worked
put - work
• field 분야
• put effort 노력을 쏟다
> **정답** had put - has worked

---

**12.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
He makes many foreign friends when he attended a
university in Los Angeles.
is making
had made
makes
has made
> **정답** had made

---

**13.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> My grandfather had been ill in bed for a month
when I came back from the trip
I had never tried skydiving before I visited
Australia.
My sister had lived in Busan for two years
before she moved to Seoul.
I had never seen any of Picasso's paintings
before I visited the art gallery.
She had read the book twice before I watched
it in a movie.
> **정답** My sister had lived in Busan for two years before she
moved to Seoul.

---

**14.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> I had learned English for three years before I
entered elementary school.
I had never traveled abroad before I traveled
to America.
The dog had been ill for several days when it
was rescued.
I had thought about it three times before I
bought the clothes.
He had traveled to Italy many times before he
went to America.
> **정답** The dog had been ill for several days when it was
rescued.

---

**15.** 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
He took part in the camp last
summer. He has participated in the program
three times before he went to the camp. He
made many friends at the camp and
is still in touch with them.
• take part in ~에 참석하다
> **정답** took, had participated, made, is

---

**16.** 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
Tom is back to work today. He
return last week from a long trip to
Europe. He has never traveled
abroad before. It was a new experience for him.
> **정답** is, returned, had never traveled

---

**17.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 용법이 다른 문장을 고르시오.
He had watched the movie twice when I saw
it.
She had warned me many times before I had
an accident.
I had lived there for ten years until I went to
Mexico.
I had never seen such a great place before I
got here.
> **정답** I had lived there for ten years until I went to Mexico.

---

**18.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
My brother has sleep for five
hours when I went home.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has sleep → had slept

---

**19.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
He has never hear this song
until I sang it.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has never hear → had never heard

---

**20.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Amy looks at herself in the
mirror for an hour before she
went out.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** looks → had looked
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 049 과거완료의 용법 경험, 계속중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그들은 경기를 시작하기 전에 30분 동안 연습경기를 했다.
힌트 (     ) start, the, main game
They had played a practice game for half an hour
before they  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 started, the, main, game

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Sana는 그에게 편지를 보내기 전에 두 번 읽어봤다.
힌트 (     ) read, the, letter
Sana  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  twice before she
mailed it to him.
정답 had, read, the, letter

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그가 15살이 되던 때까지 그는 할머니와 살았다.
힌트 (     ) live, with
He  (     )   (     )   (     )  his grandmother by the
time he was 15 years old.
정답 had, lived, with

---

**04.** 다음 그림을 보고, 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
![그림](public/images/units/049_desc_01.webp)
완성하시오.
hurt, his, leg
Isaac  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  once before he
became a runner.
정답 had, hurt, his, leg

---

**05.** 다음 그림을 보고, 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
![그림](public/images/units/049_desc_05.webp)
완성하시오.
meet, him
She  (     )   (     )   (     )  only three times before
she became to like him.
정답 had, met, him

---

**06.** 다음 그림을 보고, 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
![그림](public/images/units/049_desc_06.webp)
완성하시오.
pack, her, bag
The day before she went on a trip, she  (     )  
  (     )  for five hours.
• The day before 그 전날
정답 had, packed, her, bag

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
see
A: I heard you didn't go to the movie with Amy last
night. Why didn't you go?
B: I  (     )   (     )  it before, so he went to see the
movie with another friend.
정답 had, seen

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 사용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오.
never, wear [2번 사용]
Last week, Amy  (     )  a shirt and a skirt when
we met. Before that time, she  (     )   (     )  
anything but a T-shirt and jeans.
정답 wore, had, never, worn

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 사용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오.
rain
It  (     )   (     )  for hours when I left the house, so I
opened my umbrella.
• earthquake 지진
정답 had, rained

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
Kelly [post] (     )  on her blog every day. She
[don't use] (     )  the computer before she was ten.
Since she learned computer, she [write]
about herself by using the computer.]
정답 posts, hadn't used, has written

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 049: 과거완료의 용법 경험, 계속 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They __________ near my school for five years when they moved there. have lived has lived had lived live
> 정답: had lived

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My sister __________ a nurse before she went abroad. had been have been has been is
> 정답: had been

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The coach __________ the players for 20 minutes when I entered the gym.
He __________ in the gym for an hour before I arrived. taught - is teaches - is has taught - has been had taught - had been
> 정답: had taught - had been

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He __________ about her talent many times since he met her.
He __________ anyone like her before then. had heard - had never seen had heard - never saw has heard - had never seen has heard - has never seen
> 정답: has heard - had never seen

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Before I came to Japan, I __________ to China twice.
I __________ such a beautiful place before I traveled there. had traveled - had never seen travel - saw had traveled - have never seen travel - see
> 정답: had traveled - had never seen

---

**06.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 공원이 유명해지기 전에 큰 축제가 여러 번 있었다.
Big festivals have been held several times before the park became famous.
Big festivals are held several times before the park becomes famous.
Big festivals has been held several times before the park becomes famous.
Big festivals had been held several times before the park became famous.
> 정답: Big festivals had been held several times before the

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
어제 핸드폰이 완전히 망가지기 전에 그는 핸드폰을 세 번 사용했다.
He had used the phone three times before it breaks down yesterday.
He uses the phone three times before it breaks down yesterday.
He had used the phone three times before it broke down yesterday.
He has used the phone three times before it broke down yesterday.
> 정답: He had used the phone three times before it

---

**08.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
<보기> Amy had read the book three times when I bought it from her.
Mina had been to London three times when she was young.
I had cleaned my room twice before I had lunch.
Jake had dried the clothes for one hour before it rained.
Tom had waited for the bus for 30 minutes when it arrived.
> 정답: Mina had been to London three times when she was

---

**09.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy had failed many times before she won the award.
She had taught math for two years by the time I entered middle school.
He had learned German for three years before he went to Germany.
We had checked the list twice before we started.
They had practiced for four hours before they had the concert.
> 정답: We had checked the list twice before we started.

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 용법이 다른 문장을 고르시오.
He had played soccer for 2 hours before he did his homework.
She had waited for me for one hour when I arrived.
He had fixed his bike several times before he bought a new one.
By the time I finished my work, I had worked at this shop for three years.
> 정답: He had fixed his bike several times before he

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She __________ in a lot of effort before she succeeded.
He __________ in this club for two years since he came to our school. has put - has worked had put - has worked have put - has worked put - work
